P344.label: director of photography

P348.label: software version identifier

P371.label: presenter

P375.label: space launch vehicle

P376.label: located on astronomical body

P393.label: edition number

P395.label: licence plate code

P408.label: software engine

P413.label: position played on team / speciality

P416.label: quantity symbol (string)

P417.label: patron saint

P418.label: has seal, badge, or sigil

P452.label: industry

P110.label: illustrator

P112.label: founder

P113.label: airline hub

P115.label: home venue

P118.label: league or competition

P138.label: named after

P141.label: IUCN conservation status

P159.label: headquarters location

P166.label: award received

P629.label: edition or translation of
